words.definition_vi: mặc dù sự thật là; bất chấp điều kiện nào, vẫn làm gì đó; cấu trúc chính thức hơn 'despite'
words.definition_en: a formal phrase meaning 'in spite of the fact that'; used to introduce a contrasting or surprising statement
synonyms: in spite of the fact that
words.example_sentence: Notwithstanding the fact that the economy was struggling, consumer spending remained surprisingly resilient throughout the quarter.

words.definition_vi: ngược lại; đảo chiều logic; dùng để giới thiệu ý kiến hoàn toàn đối lập
words.definition_en: in a way that is the opposite or reverse of something previously stated
words.example_sentence: While developed nations have seen declining birth rates, conversely, many developing countries continue to experience rapid population growth.

words.definition_vi: một cách mâu thuẫn/nghịch lý; điều gì đó vừa đúng vừa sai theo logic thông thường
words.definition_en: in a way that seems contradictory or absurd, yet may be true in reality
words.example_sentence: Paradoxically, the more safety regulations were introduced, the more workplace accidents occurred due to complacency among workers.

words.definition_vi: mặc dù; tuy nhiên; dùng để thêm thông tin làm giảm nhẹ hoặc sửa đổi câu trước
words.definition_en: though; although; used to introduce a concession or qualification to a previous statement
words.example_sentence: The project was completed successfully, albeit with some delays due to unforeseen supply chain disruptions.

words.definition_vi: theo cùng lý do; vì lý do tương tự; dùng để nối hai ý kiến có logic song song
words.definition_en: for the same reason; in the same way; used to introduce a parallel or similar point
words.example_sentence: If we accept that climate change requires immediate action, by the same token, we must invest heavily in renewable energy infrastructure.

words.definition_vi: ở một mức độ nào đó; phần nào; dùng để nhượng bộ một phần nhưng không hoàn toàn đồng ý
words.definition_en: partly; to some degree; used to acknowledge partial truth while maintaining a contrasting position
words.example_sentence: While social media has improved connectivity, to a certain extent, it has also contributed to increased anxiety and mental health issues among teenagers.

words.definition_vi: mặt khác; từ góc độ khác; dùng để giới thiệu quan điểm đối lập một cách tự nhiên
words.definition_en: on the other hand; from a different perspective; used to introduce a contrasting viewpoint informally
words.example_sentence: Remote work offers flexibility and reduced commute time; on the flip side, it can blur the boundaries between professional and personal life.

words.definition_vi: dù sao đi nữa; trong mọi trường hợp; dùng để kết luận rằng điều gì đó đúng bất kể tình huống
words.definition_en: regardless of other circumstances; in any situation; used to assert that a conclusion holds true despite preceding arguments
words.example_sentence: Whether the policy is popular or not, in any case, the government must prioritize public health and safety.

words.definition_vi: tuy nhiên; dù sao đi nữa; dùng để nhượng bộ nhưng vẫn duy trì quan điểm chính
words.definition_en: nevertheless; despite what has been said; used to concede a point while maintaining the main argument
words.example_sentence: The research has limitations, all the same, the findings provide valuable insights into consumer behavior patterns.

words.definition_vi: đồng thời; cùng một lúc; dùng để chỉ hai sự việc xảy ra song song mà không nhất thiết phải tương phản
words.definition_en: at the same time; simultaneously; indicating that two events or processes happen together
words.example_sentence: The company expanded into three new markets concurrently while maintaining operations in existing regions, demonstrating ambitious growth strategy.
